title: A Partially Animated Back to the Past
description:
WATCH OUT... THIS MAY BE A LITTLE TOO EXPLICIT FOR YOUNG, PURE, INNOCENT EYES...

---------------------------------------------

For more videos visit my new channel, where I'm currently uploading new stuff!
http://www.youtube.com/user/PennazProductions

---------------------------------------------

It's been so long since my last upload... I'm very sorry for that!

Well, what you see here is an animated version of one of my fauvorite youtube-poops of all time, called "A partially uncensored back to the past".

It was made long ago by Warlusguy (please haters of this guy... stay calm if you are watching this ok???); by the way, this is not a fan-work made from a fanboy who want to be loved by other fanboys ok?? 
I liked the poop, I decided to animate how I immaginated it! That's all folks!

If you want to see the original audio-poop, there it is:

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0eNscvGOmnE
